CustomField.description: Idempotency guard for NEPA_Stage_Gate_Orchestrator. Set to true by the orchestrator after it successfully advances nepa_process_stage__c. Reset to false by a before-save flow when nepa_status__c on the parent ApplicationTimeline record changes away from Completed, or when a new ApplicationTimeline event is opened. Prevents concurrent ApplicationTimeline completions for the same process from advancing the stage twice in a race condition.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Internal idempotency flag — managed by Stage Gate Orchestrator. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Stage Gate Processed
